title: Ball Pump Needles, 6 Pcs Air Pump Needles, Ball Pump Inflation Needle, Inflating Pump Needle, for Basketball, Soccer, Rugby, Volleyball, Etc
features: 🏀 High Quality: The ball pump needles is made of high quality material, strong and durable, not easily damaged or broken, reusable.
🏀 Wide Application: The ball pump needles can be used for all kinds of inflatable sports balls, such as soccer, basketball, volleyball, rugby, yoga, tennis, etc. It is very convenient.

🏀 Unique Design: The air pump needles have two air inlets to ensure fast and efficient inflation of the balls by increased air flow. One air inlet is located on the side, which prevents the ball from being damaged by over-inflation.

🏀 Portable: The ball pump inflation needle measures about 3.8 x 0.7 cm, is lightweight and easy to carry, easy to use and store during outdoor activities, a great helper for coaches, players and ball players.
🏀 Intimate Service: If you have any questions about our products, please contact us in time, we will solve the problem for you within 24 hours.
